resources.string: This app stays on the phone, reads the current music session, fetches lyrics online, and sends metadata to the head unit over Bluetooth.
Status: ready, waiting for the head unit to connect
Status: notification access is still disabled
Status: app notifications are still disabled
Status: nearby devices (Bluetooth) permission is still disabled
Status: notification access is granted, but the listener is inactive. Repair it below.
Status: nearby devices (Bluetooth) permission is missing
Status: turn Bluetooth on, then wait for the head unit
Status: failed to open Bluetooth server
Status: waiting for the head unit to reconnect
Status: this head unit changed. Reset trusted head unit, then reconnect.
Status: head unit %1$s uses protocol %2$d; this app supports %3$d-%4$d. Update both apps together.
Status: trusted head unit reset. Reconnect from the head unit now.
Keeps the Bluetooth companion link ready for the head unit.
Car lyrics phone companion is running
Bluetooth connection service is keeping the head unit link ready.
Recommended next step: enable notification access for the phone companion.
Recommended next step: repair the notification listener binding.
Recommended next step: allow nearby devices permission for Bluetooth.
Recommended next step: reset the trusted head unit, then reconnect from the head unit.
Enter the base URL of a trusted LRCLIB-compatible server. The mirror is tried first, then the official server.
Enter a valid HTTPS base URL.

1. Enable notification access so the app can see the current music session.
2. Keep Bluetooth on and pair the phone with the head unit.
3. Open the head-unit app and connect to this phone.
4. Start music playback on the phone. The companion will stream artwork, progress, and lyrics over Bluetooth.
